productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Max Turbulence+ 17 White Orange Shoe
description: Offering superior cushioning and flexibility in a sporty design, the nike Air Max Turbulence+ is ideal for neutral runners. With top notch cushioning and a visible Air Max heel, it's a great shoe for both the trail and for casual wear. What's even better is that this shoe is nike+ compatible, allowing you to use Nike+ products to clock your runs and calories in style.Upper Mesh upper for maximum breathability Targetted overlays for added support where you need it most Forefoot windows for additional support and to offer an athletic Fit and feel Perforated midfoot overlays for added shoe structure and ventilation Lace-up system for snug, customised fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug, breathable comfort Synthetic swoosh overlays on the sides for added shoe support and style Midsole Full length Cushlon foam midsole for maximum cushioning and all-day comfort Visible Air Max unit in the heel for ultimate impact protection during heel-strike Fitsole footbed for padded all-day comfort, customised fit and enhanced support to the foot Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Durable, environmentally preferred rubber outsole in waffle pattern for maximum traction and grip on all terrain Carbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistance Flex grooves in the forefoot for flexible foot movement and for a smooth ride Impact guidance system for better energy return and impact protection Nike+ unit to use compatible devices Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
